title: Marla Williams
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Marla Williams
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

biography: Marla Williams completed an MA and a PhD in mathematics at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln, after earning a BA in mathematics from Willamette University. Outside of math, she enjoys running, baking, birdwatching, board games, and crocheting.
education_entries: Ph D in Mathematics, University of Nebraska-Lincoln
MA in Mathematics, University of Nebraska-Lincoln
research_interests: Low-dimensional topology Geometric topology Trisections of smooth 4-manifolds Flat surface bundles Mapping class groups
teaching_interests: Statistics Precalculus Calculus Linear Algebra Topology
